patches_added.name: Unlock all tribes
patches_added.description: Unlocks all 20 tribes by setting the debug flag in Unity PlayerPrefs via SharedPreferences.

patches_modified.name: Free in-app purchases
patches_modified.description: Skips Google Play Billing by creating a fake Purchase and calling nativeOnPurchasesUpdated directly via extension.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Pro
patches_modified.description: Unlock Pro Features in Cashew App

patches_removed.name: Bypass member rights check
patches_removed.description: Forces MemberCheckResult.isPassed() to always return Boolean.TRUE.

patches_removed.name: Clear VIP resolution tip
patches_removed.description: Forces MemberResolutionBean.getVipResolutionTip() to always return Boolean.FALSE.

patches_removed.name: Spoof member brief info
patches_removed.description: Forces MemberBriefInfo.isActive()=true, getMemberType()=2, getExpiryDate()='2035-12-31'. MemberBriefInfo is a lightweight summary bean used in home/profile cards — discovered via MovieboxHooker (Kero309x) analysis.

patches_removed.name: Spoof member info
patches_removed.description: Forces MemberInfo active=true, memberType=2 (VIP), days=3650, expiryDate/nextRenewDate='2035-12-31'. Previously only patched isActive+getDaysLeft+getExpiryDate; now also patches getMemberType()+getNextRenewDate() discovered via MovieboxHooker analysis.

patches_removed.name: Spoof member provider flags
patches_removed.description: Forces MMKV member gates to true. Phone (com.community.oneroom): e()Z=kv_is_pay_enable_member, f()Z=kv_is_skip_ad. India (com.community.mbox.in): d()Z=kv_is_pay_enable_member, f()Z=kv_is_skip_ad. Both share f()Z for kv_is_skip_ad; primary gate method differs per package.

patches_removed.name: Suppress newbie bonus dialog
patches_removed.description: Makes MemberProvider ClaimMemberDialog trigger return-void. Phone (com.community.oneroom): z(F)V. India (com.community.mbox.in): w(F)V. Both suppressed via name search.

patches_removed.name: Unlock download member requirement
patches_removed.description: Forces DownloadBean.getRequireMemberType() to always return Integer(0), making all download items appear as freely downloadable regardless of VIP tier. Discovered via MovieboxHooker (Kero309x) analysis.

patches_removed.name: Unlock member resolution
patches_removed.description: Forces MemberResolutionBean.isUnlock() to always return Boolean.TRUE.

patches_removed.name: Bypass TV episode VIP gate
patches_removed.description: Forces BffSubjectInfo.isVip() to always return false, making every episode appear as non-VIP-only so playback is not blocked in DetailFragment.

patches_removed.name: Clear VIP resolution tip
patches_removed.description: Forces MemberResolutionBean.getVipResolutionTip() to always return Boolean.FALSE.

patches_removed.name: Spoof TV account VIP status
patches_removed.description: Forces BffGetVipUserInfoData.isVip() to always return Boolean.TRUE.

patches_removed.name: Unlock member resolution
patches_removed.description: Forces MemberResolutionBean.isUnlock() to always return Boolean.TRUE.

patches_removed.name: Bypass member rights check
patches_removed.description: Forces MemberCheckResult.isPassed() to always return Boolean.TRUE.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Pro
patches_modified.description: Unlocks all premium features in Case Tracker — Immigration.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Plus
patches_modified.description: Unlocks Sticker.ly PLUS subscriptionNote: For Facebook Login, Uninstall Facebook App.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Pro
patches_modified.description: Unlocks Splitwise Pro features, removes ad banners, and suppresses all upgrade upsell prompts.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Pro
patches_modified.description: Unlocks all Citizen Plus/Protect features: Safety Network, Safety Center, Zones, Live Agent, Offender alerts, Clarity crime map, incident video, and more.
